name: integration_went_from_0_to_1k_mrr_if_i_started_my
method: Went from $0 to $1k MRR. If I started my SaaS over, here's exactly what I'd do After going from $0 to $1K MRR, I've learned that what you focus on matters, but the order you focus on it matters even m

phases.name: extract_framework
steps: parse 7-step sequence into structured scoring rubric
identify recurring-painpoint filter as new APP_FACTORY scoring dimension

phases.name: apply_scoring
steps: re-score app factory queue with recurring-usage weight boost (+1.5 for daily/weekly recurrence)
flag one-time-use apps below kill threshold for review

phases.name: content_repurpose
steps: generate 3 tweets from framework using engagement_bait_converter
generate 1 thread: 'The exact sequence to hit $1K MRR (most founders get the ORDER wrong)'
